title: Purpur AFK
description: A simple plugin to add an AFK command to Purpur servers
body:
# Purpur AFK

This is simple plugin to add a /afk command to [Purpur](https://purpurmc.org). 

Instead of waiting for Purpur to broadcast its [built in AFK message](https://purpurmc.org/docs/Configuration/afk-broadcast-away) on a timer, you can go AFK yourself using the /afk command added.

Additionally, it also keeps users who are vanished from having AFK events triggered.
